scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:mcp
scripts.build:mcp: bun build packages/mcp/src/index.ts --bundle --target=bun --minify --outfile dist/rollbar-mcp.js --external sury --external @valibot/to-json-schema --external effect
scripts.compile: bun run compile:cli && bun run compile:mcp
scripts.compile:mcp: bun build packages/mcp/src/index.ts --compile --minify --outfile dist/rollbar-mcp --external sury --external @valibot/to-json-schema --external effect
